meta.purpose: Truth-synced layout manifest reflecting the currently migrated repository state and safe World-1-first implementation lane.

must_port.reason: Source-of-truth transfer pack; preserve readable and intact.
Operational docs and migration truth docs.

layout.docs/: Live docs + migration truths + implementation lane.
